description:
Phase 1 establishes the type-level and configuration foundation for execution mode branching without changing any runtime behavior yet. Every subsequent phase depends on this foundation being solid.

## Goals

1. Introduce `WorkerExecutionMode`, `CurrentBranchCheckout`, `WorktreeCheckout`, `WorkerCheckout` discriminated union types
2. Add `workerExecution.mode` config with env override `PI_BEADWORK_WORKER_EXECUTION_MODE`
3. Add the `verified` worker status to the type surface and ripple through all status-dependent code
4. Normalize existing registry records as `worktree` workers on load
5. Implement `prepareWorkerCheckout()` as the mode-branching dispatcher
6. Prevent worktree config from leaking into current-branch paths

## Key Design Constraints

- `executionMode` must be the single discriminant everywhere: registry, summaries, TUI, orchestration, diagnostics, launch, verification, landing, cleanup
- `worktreePath` remains only for legacy records and `worktree` workers; current-branch workers must NOT fake `worktreePath = repoRoot`
- Old registry records without `executionMode` normalize to `worktree` automatically
- The `verified` status addition ripples through: registry serialization, normalization, tracking/notices, diagnostics/worker-manager, action gating, summaries, and bounded-loop stop conditions
- `worktrees.copyFiles`, `worktrees.setupCommands`, `worktrees.cleanup`, `worktrees.rerunSetupOnReuse` are ignored when mode is `current-branch`

## Files likely affected

- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/types.ts` — core type changes
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/config.ts` — new config block + env parsing
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/registry.ts` — normalization + serialization
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/orchestrator.ts` — mode-branching prep
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/worktree.ts` — `prepareWorkerCheckout` wrapping existing prep
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/worker-diagnostics.ts` — status/mode display
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/session-state.ts` — status-aware summaries
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/` — regression coverage

## Definition of Done

- Types compile and express impossible-state elimination
- Config loads `workerExecution.mode` with env override
- `verified` status is handled in all status-switch paths
- Existing worktree tests still pass (no behavior change yet)
- New tests cover normalization, config parsing, type guards
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Phase 1: Substrate foundation — types, config, registry normalization
